  "themes": [
    {
      "id": "A",
      "bar_start": 1,
      "bar_end": 8,
      "description": "Primary theme in G-flat major; gentle triplet arpeggiation in right hand over sustained left-hand harmonies; lyrical cantabile melody outlining I–IV–V–I progression"
    },
    {
      "id": "A-continuation",
      "bar_start": 9,
      "bar_end": 16,
      "description": "Continuation and varied repetition of primary theme with expanded harmonic motion through II and V7/V before cadential closure on I"
    },
    {
      "id": "A-transition",
      "bar_start": 17,
      "bar_end": 24,
      "description": "Transitional passage extending primary theme material; intensified harmonic motion through V7/V and V preparing half cadence into middle section"
    },
    {
      "id": "B1",
      "bar_start": 25,
      "bar_end": 31,
      "description": "Middle section opens in E-flat minor (relative minor); fff-to-piano dynamic contrast; arpeggiated bass figures with chromatic inner voices; Neapolitan-inflected harmonies"
    },
    {
      "id": "B2",
      "bar_start": 32,
      "bar_end": 38,
      "description": "Continuation in C-flat major (enharmonic = B major); serene, hymn-like texture; tonic pedal with stepwise melody; plagal and subdominant harmonies emphasized"
    },
    {
      "id": "B3",
      "bar_start": 39,
      "bar_end": 47,
      "description": "Developmental passage in C-flat major / A-flat minor; dramatic octave bass descents; climactic sequential chromatic motion preparing enharmonic reinterpretation"
    },
    {
      "id": "B4-enharmonic",
      "bar_start": 48,
      "bar_end": 54,
      "description": "Enharmonic region: C-flat major reinterpreted as B major; modulatory passage employing German augmented sixth chord that resolves back to G-flat major tonic at bar 54; fermata close"
    },
    {
      "id": "A'",
      "bar_start": 55,
      "bar_end": 70,
      "description": "Recapitulation of primary theme in G-flat major; largely parallel to bars 1–16 with slight ornamental variants; pp dynamic throughout"
    },
    {
      "id": "A'-extended",
      "bar_start": 71,
      "bar_end": 78,
      "description": "Extended recapitulation passage with chromatic median excursion to E-double-flat and C-flat before chromatic passing chords; mysterious pp to ppp dynamic descent"
    },
    {
      "id": "Chromatic-episode",
      "bar_start": 79,
      "bar_end": 83,
      "description": "Brief chromatic episode: key signature shifts to C natural (enharmonic pivot area); D–F#–B harmonies suggest B minor / D major tonicization before augmented sixth chord restores G-flat major"
    },
    {
      "id": "Coda",
      "bar_start": 84,
      "bar_end": 86,
      "description": "Coda: ppp final statements of I with morendo arpeggiation; tonic prolonged through sustained whole notes with final fermata chord closing the work"
    }
  ]
